title: Instability of Alpha Oscillatory States in Autism and Familial Liability: Evidence from Burst-Resolved High-Density EEG.
abstract: HD-EEG in 117 children (39 non-autistic, 52 autistic, 26 siblings). Autistic children show shorter alpha burst duration and reduced alpha abundance with siblings at intermediate (liability gradient). Alpha power reduction driven by temporal instability rather than amplitude.
